blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
